title: Has anyone ever done something for you?
content:
Has anyone ever done something for you?

Bought ya a baconeggencheese? a bus ticket? the bridge toll to the New Jersey pumpkin patch?

A movie ticket? dinner? Filled your gas tank?

A secret sniferoo in the bathroom stall?

Brought a bottle of the cheap champagne to your homemade shit brunch (not everyone can make eggs yanno)?

A bailout? An election?

My momma always told me two things (take this with a pinch of salt [she had me at twenty {when children know nothing about anything}]): swearing reveals your lack of vocabulary…and no thing in this world is free.

Only one thing that cunt said has proven to been emphatically fucking true.

If Nascar drivers have to say it loud and proud who filled their gas tank shouldn’t politicians? At least then when stepping up to the buffet table we can have a serving of what we like. We’ll know when chicken is chicken or when dog is chicken.
context: From document: Has anyone ever done something for you?
